a:r.a:t: Review priority findings across compensation and career pathing
to simplify plans and improve rep experience
Discuss path forward and where we will need your input in the coming weeks
Review overarching findings and primary gaps that were identified
Discuss findings across the four key dimensions:
Review quick wins and align on go-forward business imperatives for future state design
Assess compensation, governance, and data to inform near‑term and future recommendations that simplify the seller experience, reinforce pay‑for‑performance, and enable scalable growth.
